acceptance_criteria: 1) Loop constructs SubmitHandler from the same SubmitSlot used by clear/take helpers. 2) Successful SUBMIT reaches typed output path. 3) Validation/assertion failures round-trip to feedback path without invariant errors.
description: Replace placeholder SubmitHandler construction in the RLM loop with concrete slot-bound handler construction so SUBMIT writes into the exact slot that loop lifecycle reads. Ensure clear-before-exec and take-after-exec remain deterministic.
title: Wire slot-bound SubmitHandler into RLM loop
